durable_slice.summary: Implemented the fail-closed boundary between accepted retained-ledger state and replay comparison.
durable_slice.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-equivalent committed logic.

external_blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN before the deployment workflow can return and verify a public Cloudflare Pages hostname.
next_action: Add workflow retrieval and cryptographic authentication of the prior replay-ledger artifact, then invoke build-replay-ledger-consumption-decision.mjs and build-replay-comparison-input.mjs before any replay-dependent acceptance decision.
